title: andryala atlanticola
intro: Andryala atlanticola, also known as Atlantic andryala or Atlantic rockrose, is a flowering plant species native to the western Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and wounds. Andryala atlanticola contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including soothing digestive problems, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Andryala atlanticola include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically prepared from the leaves and flowers of the plant.
